translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Those whom they call upon, instead of Allah have no power of intercession, except such that testify to the truth based on knowledge.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: And those whom they invoke instead of Him have no power of intercession -- except for those who bear witness to the truth knowingly, and they know.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: And those unto whom they cry instead of Him possess no power of intercession, saving him who beareth witness unto the Truth knowingly.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Those whom they invoke besides Him have no power of intercession, except those who are witness to the truth and who know [for whom to intercede].

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Those whom they call upon, other than Him, have no power to intercede (for them), except those that have knowingly borne witness to the truth.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: Those whom they worship besides God are not able to intercede, except for those among them who believe in the Truth (God) and who know whom to intercede for.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: And those whom they call upon besides Him have no authority for intercession, but he who bears witness of the truth and they know (him).

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Those whom they invoke besides God have no power of intercession, only those who bear witness to the truth and they know.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: And those whom they invoke besides Allah have no power of intercession;- only he who bears witness to the Truth, and they know (him).

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Wala yamliku allatheena yadAAoona min doonihi alshshafaAAata illa man shahida bialhaqqi wahum yaAAlamoona

87.arabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: If you ask them who created them, they will answer: "God." How then can they turn away?

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: And if you ask them as to Who created them, they will surely answer “Allah” – so where are they reverting?

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: If thou askest them, 'Who created you?' they will say, 'God.' How then are they perverted?

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: And wert thou to ask them who created them, they will surely say: God. Witherward then are they deviating!

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: And if you ask them who created them, they will surely say: "Allah". How then are they turned away (from the worship of Allah, Who created them)?

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: And if you asked them, “Who created them?”, they would say, “God.” Why then do they deviate?

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: If you were to ask them: “Who created them?” they will surely say: “Allah.” Whence are they, then, being led astray?

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: And if you ask them who created them, they will surely say: "Allah." How then are they turned away

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: And if thou ask them who created them, they will surely say: Allah. How then are they turned away?

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: If you ask them, ‘Who created them?’ they will surely say, ‘Allah.’ Then where do they stray?

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Yet if you ask them: 'Who created you' they will say: 'Allah' How then can they turn away from Him?

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allah." So how are they deluded?

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: (Muhammad), if you ask them, "Who had created the idols?" They will certainly say, "God has created them." Why do you then turn away from God?

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: And if you should ask them who created them, they would certainly say: Allah. Whence are they then turned back?

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: And if you ask them who created them, they will surely say, God. How then are they turned away?

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: If thou ask them, who created them, they will certainly say, Allah: How then are they deluded away (from the Truth)?

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Walain saaltahum man khalaqahum layaqoolunna Allahu faanna yufakoona

88.arabic: وَقِيلِهِۦ يَـٰرَبِّ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: And (the Prophet) will say: "O Lord, these are certainly a people who do not believe."

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: And by oath of the saying of My Prophet “O my Lord! These people do not accept faith!”

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: And for his saying, 'My Lord, surely these are a people who believe not' --

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: And We hear his saying: my Lord! verily these are a people who believe not.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: (Allah has knowledge) of (Prophet Muhammad's) saying: "O my Lord! Verily, these are a people who believe not!"

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: As for his statement: “My Lord, these are a people who do not believe.”

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: We call to witness the cry of the Messenger: “O Lord, these are a people not wont to believe!”

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: And his saying: "O my Lord! Verily, these are a people who believe not!"

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: And he saith: O my Lord! Lo! these are a folk who believe not.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: And his plaint: ‘My Lord! Indeed these are a people who will not have faith!’

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: And for his saying: 'My Lord, these are an unbelieving nation'

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: And [Allah acknowledges] his saying, "O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe."

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: (God has knowledge of Muhammad's words when he complains to Him), "My Lord, these, my people, do not believe".

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Consider his cry: O my Lord! surely they are a people who do not believe.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: The Prophet has said, "Lord! Truly they are a people who do not believe."

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: (Allah has knowledge) of the (Prophet's) cry, "O my Lord! Truly these are people who will not believe!"

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Waqeelihi yarabbi inna haolai qawmun la yuminoona

89.arabic: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَـٰمٌ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Turn away from them and say: "Peace." They will come to know soon.

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Therefore excuse them and proclaim, “Peace”; for they will soon come to know.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: yet pardon them, and say, 'Peace!' Soon they will know.

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Wherefore turn thou aside from them, and say: peace. presently they shall come to know.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: So turn away from them (O Muhammad SAW), and say: Salam (peace)! But they will come to know.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Pardon them, and say, “Peace.” They will come to know.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Indulge them, (O Prophet), and say to them: “Peace to you.” For soon they shall come to know.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: So turn away from them, and say: Salam (peace!) But they will come to know.

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Then bear with them (O Muhammad) and say: Peace. But they will come to know.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: So disregard them, and say, ‘Peace!’ Soon they will know.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: pardon them, and say: 'Peace', soon they will know.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: So turn aside from them and say, "Peace." But they are going to know.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: We have told him, "Ignore them and say to them 'farewell'. They will soon know the consequences of their deeds

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: So turn away from them and say, Peace, for they shall soon come to know.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Then bear with them [O Muhammad] and say, "Peace." They will soon come to know.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: But turn away from them, and say "Peace!" But soon shall they know!

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Faisfah AAanhum waqul salamun fasawfa yaAAlamoona
